# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  DEPLOY_TAG: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.md"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

validate_mr:
  stage: validate
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  script:
    - echo "Validating Merge Request..."
    - |
      if [ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Merge request title is empty. Please provide a descriptive title."
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      if echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | grep -qiE "^(wip|draft):"; then
        echo "ERROR: Cannot proceed with WIP/Draft merge requests."
        exit 1
      fi
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "MR Author: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_AUTHOR"
    - echo "MR Source Branch: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME"
    - echo "MR Target Branch: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME"

build:
  stage: build
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
  before_script:
    - echo "Starting build for MR - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - mkdir -p build_output
    - |
      cat > build_output/build_info.json <<EOF
      {
        "mr_title": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}",
        "mr_iid": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}",
        "mr_description": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}",
        "commit_sha": "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}",
        "commit_short_sha": "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}",
        "build_date": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
        "pipeline_id": "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}",
        "source_branch": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}",
        "target_branch": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME}",
        "author": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_AUTHOR}"
      }
      EOF
    - cat build_output/build_info.json
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build_output/
    expire_in: 1 week

test:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Running tests for MR - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Verifying build artifacts..."
    - cat build_output/build_info.json
    - echo "Tests passed successfully"

generate_release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
  before_script:
    - echo "Generating release notes..."
  script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _.-]//g')
      SANITIZED_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _.,-:;\n]//g')
    - |
      cat > ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE} <<EOF
      # Release Notes

      ## $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)

      ### Changes
      - **Feature**: ${SANITIZED_TITLE}
      - **MR**: !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}
      - **Author**: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_AUTHOR}
      - **Commit**: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}

      ### Description
      ${SANITIZED_DESCRIPTION}

      ### Build Information
      - Pipeline: #${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
      - Source Branch: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}
      - Target Branch: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME}
      - Deploy Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}
      EOF
    - cat ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    expire_in: 1 year

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
  dependencies:
    - build
    - generate_release_notes
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  before_script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_TAG=$(echo "$DEPLOY_TAG" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g' | head -c 128)
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging..."
    - echo "Deploy tag - ${SANITIZED_TAG}"
    - echo "Feature being deployed - ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - |
      echo "Creating deployment commit message..."
      DEPLOY_COMMIT_MSG="deploy: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE} [MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}] (${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA})"
      echo "${DEPLOY_COMMIT_MSG}"
    - |
      echo "Tagging deployment..."
      echo "Tag: ${SANITIZED_TAG}"
      echo "Message: Deployment of MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID} - ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - echo "Staging deployment completed"

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
      when: manual
  dependencies:
    - build
    - generate_release_notes
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  before_script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_TAG=$(echo "$DEPLOY_TAG" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g' | head -c 128)
      SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _.-]//g')
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - echo "Deploy tag - ${SANITIZED_TAG}"
    - echo "Feature being deployed - ${SANITIZED_TITLE}"
    - |
      PROD_DEPLOY_MSG="production-deploy: ${SANITIZED_TITLE} [MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}] (${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA})"
      echo "${PROD_DEPLOY_MSG}"
    - |
      echo "Creating production git tag..."
      PROD_TAG="release-$(date -u +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      echo "Production Tag: ${PROD_TAG}"
      echo "Tag Annotation: ${SANITIZED_TITLE} - MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
    - echo "Production deployment completed"

notify_slack_build:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _.-]//g')
      SANITIZED_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _.,-:;]/ /g' | head -c 500)
    - |
      echo "Sending build notification..."
      cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Build Notification",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "Build Completed: ${SANITIZED_TITLE}"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*MR:* !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Author:* ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_AUTHOR}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Branch:* ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME} -> ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Commit:* ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Pipeline:* #${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"}
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Description:*\n${SANITIZED_DESCRIPTION}"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
    - echo "Notification sent"

notify_deploy_success:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
  dependencies:
    - generate_release_notes
  script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_TAG=$(echo "$DEPLOY_TAG" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g' | head -c 128)
      SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _.-]//g')
    - |
      echo "Sending deployment notification..."
      cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Deployment Notification",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "Deployed: ${SANITIZED_TITLE}"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Deploy Tag:* ${SANITIZED_TAG}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*MR:* !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Author:* ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_AUTHOR}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Commit:* ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Pipeline:* #${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Environment:* staging"}
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Release Notes:*\nSee attached release_notes.md artifact"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
    - echo "Deploy notification sent"
    - echo "Release notes available as pipeline artifact"
